title: Nursery Rhyme. IV. Historical
content:
[The following lines were obtained in Oxfordshire. The story to which it alludes is related by Matthew Paris.]

        One moonshiny night
        As I sat high,
        Waiting for one
        To come by;
        The boughs did bend,
        My heart did ache
        To see what hole the fox did make.
meaning:
Unknown's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Nursery Rhyme. IV. Historical"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
